cards.front: What is the main function of the Operating System?
cards.back: To manage computer hardware resources and provide a platform for software applications to run

cards.front: Which part of the Operating System is responsible for managing hardware resources?
What is the purpose of the Process Manager?
cards.back: To create, manage, and terminate processes on the computer

cards.front: What is the role of the Memory Manager?
cards.back: To manage memory allocation and deallocation for running processes

cards.front: What is the function of the File System?
cards.back: To provide a way to store, retrieve, and manage files on the computer
